HESP828 Seminar in Hearing Science (3 Credits)

Recent developments in auditory psychophysics, and/or anatomy and physiology of the periperal and central auditory mechanisms. Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (Hearing and Speech Sciences: Ph.D. (Doctoral); Clinical Audiology: Au.D. or Ph.D. (Doctoral); Hearing and Speech Sciences: M.A. (Master’s)) ; and permission of BSOS-Hearing & Speech Sciences department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
